creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Wed, Sep 17, 2008 at 02:59:09PM +0000, Egorov N.V. wrote:
> >Synopsis:       www/neon28 port missmatch checksum
> 
> >Description:
> During installation of neon28 get missmatch checksum for neon-0.28.3.tar.gz.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> >Fix:
> Change values at distinfo.

Please run "make distclean" and try again.
If it keeps happening, please give the output of "ls -al
/usr/ports/distfiles/neon*" and the contents of your distinfo and
the output of "make -v PKGNAME".

Edwin
